degraded: Documentation + version-metadata iterate (docs/guide.md prose; server/package.json + client/package.json `version` 0.1.0 -> 0.18.0). No product source/test files touched, so no unit/integration/e2e/tsc/oxlint product layer applies (worktree node_modules intentionally not hydrated). guide.md claims were verified by a thorough three-part audit (3 parallel sub-agents) against actual code with file:line citations, the v0.18.0 CHANGELOG + git log, and the traceability matrix.

touches_build (package.json) performance-test layer SKIPPED per skip-rules: the change is the `version` string only — no dependency added/removed, no bundle/runtime impact, no dev_url for Lighthouse. Verified by grep that no server/client code reads package.json.version (all `*VERSION` reads are schema/contract/CLI constants); the field is unconsumed metadata aligned to the v0.18.0 release tag.

touches_migrations risk flag from the message classifier is a FALSE POSITIVE: this repo (Hono + React) has no migrations/ or RLS; the F11 verifier recomputes risk flags from the diff and will not enforce down.sql.
